title: Colored Lanterns
description: Adds colored lanterns for each dye, as well as tinted variants!
body:
## Colored Lanterns
 
This mod is a simple mod that adds a full set of lanterns for each color, as well as tinted glass variants!
Thank you all for 9,000+ downloads!!
## Preview
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24ef65fbded948778c46f3dc060efac8aa3a5d22.jpeg)
## Crafting
The lanterns can be easily crafted with a Soul Lantern, and four stained glass blocks.
For the tinted (and slightly dimmer) variant, surround a colored lantern with four Tinted Glass Blocks.
## Other
Light levels for a colored lantern is 15, while the light level for a tinted variant is 12.

## Known Bugs
Entering a server with this mod results in a crash. We are currently trying to fix this issue. Thank you for your patience and we apologize for any inconveniences caused.



*this mod's primary home is here, on Modrinth, although this mod is also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/colored-lantern)
